---
title: "Logic, Spring 2026"
sidebar: logic
---

**Text:** Smith, Peter. *An Introduction to Formal Logic*, 2nd ed. Logic Matters, 2021. (Free PDF)

**Focus:** Informal logic · Classical propositional logic · Natural deduction · Predicate logic

<!-- Migrate from redapemusic35.github.io/course.phil.logic.github.io -->
